results.title: The Marilyn Monroe You Don’t Know: An Interview with the Design Studio Who Reimagined Bungalow 1
results.description: Courtney Brannan of Champalimaud Design discusses balancing the storied history of Bungalow 1 with a soft, emotional reading of the retreat

results.title: Special needs youth are the stars in 'Disney's Frozen Jr.' at Lincoln Community Playhouse
results.description: The Lincoln Community Playhouse announced "Disney's Frozen Jr." as its annual Penguin Project. The production stars youth with special needs.
